context_notes: v1.6 + v1.7 milestones shipped via 7 PRs. Submodule main b7abab7b, parent main d0a7a75d. Audit verdict was 4 STUB / 18 HYBRID / 22 INTENTIONAL across 44 facade rows; v1.6 closed 3 of 4 STUBs + addressed 18 HYBRIDs via doc batch; v1.7 P7 closed the 4th STUB (rollback). Drift-CI gate at test/integration/test_facade_docstring_invariants.py enforces docstring honesty. v1.5 routing baseline 53.3% top-1 still standing as Phase 4 gate floor. 401/401 v1.6+v1.7 surface tests green; pyright 0/0/0 on all touched modules. Remaining failures in broad regression (haxe/kotlin/lean4/etc) are host-binary LSP gaps unrelated to v1.6/v1.7.
